compiled_state.title: RED test: Add stamp verification and idempotency tests to test-dso-setup.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Modify tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh to add test functions verifying version stamp embedding by dso-setup.sh. All tests will FAIL (RED) until the stamp_artifact() implementation task is complete.

### Test functions to add:
- test_stamp_in_shim: run dso-setup.sh on temp dir, assert `# dso-version: <version>` appears in the first 5 lines of the installed .claude/scripts/dso shim
- test_stamp_in_config: assert `# dso-version: <version>` appears in .claude/dso-config.conf
- test_stamp_in_precommit_yaml: assert `x-dso-version: <version>` is a top-level YAML key in .pre-commit-config.yaml
- test_stamp_in_ci_yaml: assert `x-dso-version: <version>` is a top-level YAML key in .github/workflows/ci.yml
- test_stamp_idempotent: run dso-setup.sh twice, assert stamps appear exactly once (no duplication)
- test_gitignore_includes_cache: assert `.claude/dso-artifact-check-cache` is in the host .gitignore
- test_yaml_stamp_survives_roundtrip: run dso-setup.sh, then merge_precommit_hooks on the stamped file, assert x-dso-version key survives
- test_validate_handles_stamped_config: run validate.sh on a repo with stamped dso-config.conf, assert exit 0 (no false positive on stamp comment)

### Test approach (Given/When/Then):
- Given: a fresh temp directory simulating a host project
- When: dso-setup.sh is run targeting the temp directory
- Then: each installed artifact contains the correct version stamp format with the version from plugin.json

### Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh | modify |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — RED-marked tests are tolerated
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 8 new test functions for stamp verification
  Verify: grep -c 'test_stamp_in_shim\|test_stamp_in_config\|test_stamp_in_precommit_yaml\|test_stamp_in_ci_yaml\|test_stamp_idempotent\|test_gitignore_includes_cache\|test_yaml_stamp_survives_roundtrip\|test_validate_handles_stamped_config' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] Each test function invokes dso-setup.sh and asserts on output (behavioral, not existence-only)
  Verify: manual review — test approach in task description describes what is executed and what output is asserted
- [ ] `.test-index` updated with RED markers for each new test function
  Verify: grep -c '\[test_stamp' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh, .test-index. Tests: pass (RED markers tolerated).
comments.author: Test
